MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Crystal Howard, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ollie R. Ashley, not present.
Order waiving apearance in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewed of brief in support of Default Judgment, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: J.T. Thorpe & Son Inc.
Counsel to prepare a details break-down of the Judgment.

Feb. 27, 2006
Judgement granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc. for details and break-down of the Judgment.
